name: ServiceNow
confidenceReason: Massive, sticky IT workflow platform with ~21.5% annualized EPS growth and elite FCF margins, though valuation still caps upside.
bullCase: The central nervous system for enterprise IT. Highly sticky subscription revenue with strong cross-selling opportunities via AI modules.
bearCase: Trades at a premium software multiple; vulnerable to broader enterprise IT spending slowdowns.

cagrModel.basis: 10-for-1 split-adjusted adjusted EPS (ServiceNow executed 10-for-1 split February 2025); mature workflow SaaS multiple

description: ServiceNow, Inc. provides cloud-based solution for digital workflows in the North America, Europe, the Middle East and Africa, Asia Pacific, and internationally.
